assessment_rule.zh: 市场适配与实机判断不并入现有评分。
assessment_rule.en: Market-fit and field-evaluation findings are not added to the existing scoring model.

conclusion.zh: 现款带典型附件后运输灵活性存在差距；PRO减重方案为历史资料，当前量产状态待验证。
conclusion.en: The current machine has a transport-flexibility gap with typical attachments. The PRO weight-reduction package is historical source material and its current production status is unverified.

records.source_type: internal transport calculation and market observation
records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

customer.zh: 承包商、租赁商、市政与公共事业单位
customer.en: Contractors, rental companies, municipalities and utilities

zh: 无需更高等级商用驾照的可运输性
挖机与快换、拇指钳、铲斗同车运输
重量和尺寸留有载荷余量
en: Transport within the intended licence class
Carry the machine with coupler, thumb and buckets
Retain payload margin in both mass and package size

zh: 代理商至终端客户交付
终端客户至施工现场转运
装载挖沟斗、清理斗、快换、拇指钳或破碎锤
en: Dealer-to-customer delivery
Customer-to-jobsite transport
Load trenching/clean-up buckets, coupler, thumb or breaker

zh: 经销商至终端客户的设备交付
终端客户至施工现场的跨工地转运
挖机与挖沟斗、清理斗、快换、拇指钳、破碎锤等机具同车运输
en: Dealer-to-customer machine delivery
Customer-to-jobsite relocation
Transport the excavator together with trenching and clean-up buckets, coupler, thumb, breaker and other work tools

zh: 轻型皮卡常见拖拽能力为12,000-14,000 lb
14K拖车包含拖车自重与载荷，源文件给出的常见有效载荷为10,000-11,500 lb（约4.5-5.2 t）
整机、属具和拖车组合重量直接影响运输许可、车辆选择和跨工地周转
en: Typical light-duty pickup tow capacity is stated as 12,000-14,000 lb
A 14K trailer rating includes trailer tare and payload; the source gives a common effective payload of 10,000-11,500 lb (about 4.5-5.2 t)
Machine, attachment and trailer combination mass directly affects licensing, vehicle selection and jobsite mobility

zh: 源文件记录在售XE35U基础机4,200 kg；加副配重200 kg、快换与拇指钳80 kg、标准斗99 kg后，组合重量约4,579 kg，运输灵活性不足。
历史XE35U PRO方案记录基础机3,800 kg，典型配置后约4,179 kg；资料认为还可携带60 kg挖沟斗或158 kg清理斗。
以上运输和驾照判断为资料形成时口径；州法规、商业用途、车辆铭牌和组合总质量仍须按实际方案复核。
en: The source records a 4,200 kg base XE35U; a 200 kg counterweight, 80 kg coupler-and-thumb package and 99 kg standard bucket raise the combination to about 4,579 kg, reducing transport flexibility.

The historical XE35U PRO proposal records a 3,800 kg base machine and about 4,179 kg with representative equipment; the source states that a 60 kg trenching bucket or 158 kg clean-up bucket could still be carried.
These transport and licence statements reflect the source-period basis. State rules, commercial use, vehicle data plates and gross combination mass require validation for the actual setup.

conclusion.zh: 基础挖掘和附件覆盖基本满足，但回转回填、推土铲浮动、行走启停稳定性与驾驶舒适性仍有差距。
conclusion.en: Basic excavation and attachment coverage are broadly adequate, but swing-assisted backfill, blade float, travel start-stop stability and cab comfort remain gaps.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

customer.zh: 承包商、租赁商、市政与公共事业单位
customer.en: Contractors, rental companies, municipalities and utilities

zh: 沟槽深度与宽度精准控制
稳定吊装排水管、路缘石等预制件
高效回填和平整
狭小街区操作与低扰民
en: Accurate trench depth and width
Stable lifting of pipe and curb components
Productive backfill and grading
Confined-street operation with low disturbance

zh: 测量与路线规划
破碎旧路面并清运
沟槽开挖与底部找平
吊装管道或预制件
回填、压实与地面恢复
安装调试并完成景观整理
en: Survey and route planning
Break and remove the old surface
Excavate and trim the trench bottom
Lift pipe or precast components
Backfill, compact and restore the surface
Commission utilities and finish landscaping

zh: 排水沟和排水管道
光纤管道
人行道基础与旧路面
路缘石和水泥预制件
喷淋系统、景观石及其他市政设施
en: Drainage ditches and pipe
Fiber-optic conduit
Sidewalk foundations and existing pavement
Curbs and concrete precast components
Irrigation equipment, landscape stone and related municipal infrastructure

zh: 挖掘深度和宽度需要精准控制，沟槽底部需同步测量和找平
在拥挤街区和狭小街道内进行多方向、多角度作业
需要完成破碎、清运、挖沟、吊装、回填、压实和表面恢复的连续任务链
需应对雨雪天气、持续施工和低扰民要求
en: Trench depth and width require accurate control with concurrent measurement and bottom trimming
Multi-directional work is performed in congested blocks and narrow streets
The workflow combines breaking, removal, trenching, lifting, backfill, compaction and surface restoration
The machine must support wet or snowy conditions, sustained operation and low-disturbance requirements

zh: 资料认为优化后的XE35U基础挖掘能力基本满足需求。
副配重和回转中心后移提升了稳定性，但资料记录行走启停时前后支重轮偏小，动态稳定性仅部分满足。
市场反馈回转力矩偏小，影响铲斗侧向回填效率；推土铲缺少浮动功能，资料建议增加回转力矩、推土铲浮动和四向推土铲。
历史XE35U PRO方案采用更大的驾驶空间；该方案是否已在当前量产机实现需重新核验。
资料记录当时未配置蜂鸣器消音，后续仪表报警逻辑属于历史计划，当前状态待核。
双管路和快换为多铲斗、破碎锤、拇指钳等机具提供基础匹配条件。
en: The source assesses the optimized XE35U as broadly adequate for baseline excavation.

Counterweight and a rearward center of rotation improved stability, but the source records only partial dynamic stability during travel starts and stops because the front and rear track rollers were undersized.
Market feedback in the source identifies low swing torque as a backfill-productivity issue and the blade lacks float; the proposed response was higher swing torque, blade float and a four-way blade.
The historical XE35U PRO proposal used a larger operator environment; implementation on the current production machine must be revalidated.
The source records no alarm-muting function at that time. Later display-based alarm logic was a historical plan and its current status is unverified.
Dual auxiliary plumbing and a quick coupler provide a foundation for buckets, breaker, thumb and other work tools.

conclusion.zh: 双管路、快换与拇指钳适配基本满足；封闭驾驶环境、精细操控和低扰民功能需按当前配置复核。
conclusion.en: Dual auxiliary lines, coupler and thumb compatibility are broadly adequate. Enclosed-cab protection, fine control and low-disturbance functions require current-configuration verification.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

customer.zh: 中小承包商、租赁商、市政单位
customer.en: Small/midsize contractors, rental companies and municipalities

zh: 铲斗与拇指钳协同
高粉尘工况的封闭驾驶室
安全作业范围
选择性拆除的精细控制
en: Bucket-and-thumb coordination
Enclosed cab for dusty work
Safe working reach
Fine control for selective demolition

zh: 铲斗与拇指钳拆解结构
分段大块物料
分类并装车清运
en: Dismantle structures with bucket and thumb
Reduce large material into manageable sections
Sort and load debris for removal

zh: 木制小型棚舍
轻型房屋结构
拆除后的木料和大块废料
en: Small timber sheds
Light building structures
Timber and large debris after demolition

zh: 挖斗与拇指钳需协同完成推倒、拆解、夹持和装车
高粉尘环境需要封闭且密封良好的驾驶室
需要足够作业范围，使设备与建筑保持安全距离
选择性拆除需要精细操控，避免损坏保留结构和设施
en: Bucket and thumb must work together for knockdown, dismantling, gripping and loading
High dust exposure requires an enclosed and well-sealed cab
Working range must preserve a safe distance between the machine and structure
Selective demolition requires fine control to protect retained structures and utilities

zh: 资料认为优化后的XE35U可基本覆盖小型拆除任务。
历史XE35U PRO方案提出扩大驾驶空间，但驾驶室密封、过滤和当前配置仍需实机核验。
资料记录当时蜂鸣器不具备消音功能，后续报警逻辑属于历史计划。
双管路、快换和拇指钳兼容为拆解和装车提供基础；精细操控和破碎锤液压匹配仍需验证。
en: The source assesses the optimized XE35U as broadly capable of light-demolition work.
The historical XE35U PRO proposal enlarged the operator environment, while cab sealing, filtration and current equipment still require machine validation.
The source records no alarm-muting function at that time; later alarm logic was a historical plan.
Dual plumbing, coupler and thumb compatibility provide a basis for dismantling and loading; fine control and breaker hydraulic matching still require validation.

conclusion.zh: 短尾与动臂偏摆支持受限空间，但深度精度、回转回填和推土铲功能需要实机验证和改进。
conclusion.en: Short-tail geometry and boom swing support confined work, but depth accuracy, swing-assisted backfill and blade functions require field validation and improvement.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

customer.zh: 承包商、租赁商、市政与公共事业单位
customer.en: Contractors, rental companies, municipalities and utilities

zh: 精确控制尺寸、坡度与深度
贴近现有建筑安全施工
动臂偏摆配合短尾回转
清理斗与推土铲高效回填
en: Precise dimension, slope and depth control
Safe work adjacent to existing structures
Boom swing combined with short-tail rotation
Efficient backfill with clean-up bucket and blade

zh: 现场测量与清表
破碎原结构并清运
按设计深度开挖
狭小位置偏摆作业
清理斗回填
en: Survey and clear the site
Break and remove existing structures
Excavate to design depth
Use offset digging in confined positions
Backfill with a clean-up bucket

zh: 建筑地基和基槽
原有混凝土结构
场地表面植被及回填物料
en: Building foundations and footing trenches
Existing concrete structures
Surface vegetation and backfill material

zh: 挖掘尺寸、坡度和深度需要严格控制
临近现有建筑或设施施工，需避免碰撞和结构损伤
城市或人口密集区域空间受限，需要动臂偏摆配合短尾回转
清表、破碎、挖掘和回填通常连续完成
en: Excavation dimensions, slope and depth require tight control
Work adjacent to buildings and utilities must avoid contact and structural damage
Urban or densely populated sites require boom swing combined with short-tail rotation
Clearing, breaking, excavation and backfill are commonly completed as one sequence

zh: 资料认为优化后的XE35U基本具备地基开挖能力。
短尾和动臂偏摆提供受限空间作业基础，但深度控制精度需统一工况实测。
资料记录回转力矩偏小且推土铲无浮动，影响回填和基底找平效率。
历史PRO驾驶室空间改进、蜂鸣器报警逻辑均需按当前量产配置复核。
双管路和快换可覆盖挖斗、破碎锤和拇指钳等基础附件。
en: The source considers the optimized XE35U broadly capable of foundation excavation.
Short-tail geometry and boom swing support confined work, while depth-control accuracy requires common-condition testing.
The source records weak swing torque and no blade float, reducing backfill and foundation-base finishing productivity.
Historical PRO cab-space improvements and alarm logic must be checked against the current production configuration.
Dual plumbing and a quick coupler support baseline buckets, breaker and thumb applications.

conclusion.zh: 附件基础覆盖较好，但高精度整平、地下设施保护、回转回填效率和驾驶舒适性仍需重点验证。
conclusion.en: Baseline attachment coverage is strong, while precision grading, utility protection, swing-assisted backfill productivity and cab comfort require focused validation.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

customer.zh: 景观承包商、租赁商、市政单位
customer.en: Landscape contractors, rental companies and municipalities

zh: 多方向精细操控
地形、坡度、沟槽与排水精度
地下设施保护
多铲斗、拇指钳与破碎锤兼容
en: Fine multi-directional control
Terrain, slope, trench and drainage accuracy
Protection of buried utilities
Compatibility with buckets, thumb and breaker

zh: 清表与拔除植被
地形修整和修坡
排水沟开挖
管道安装与回填
草坪基底整平
树坑与花坛开挖
收尾清理
en: Clear vegetation
Shape terrain and slopes
Excavate drainage trenches
Install pipe and backfill
Grade the lawn base
Excavate tree and planting pits
Final clean-up

zh: 花园和绿化带
草坪基底、树坑和花坛
排水沟与地下排水管道
景观石和现有地下设施
en: Gardens and landscaped areas
Lawn subgrade, tree pits and planting beds
Drainage trenches and buried drainage pipe
Landscape stone and existing underground utilities

zh: 挖掘尺寸、坡度和深度需严格控制，确保排水系统符合设计
作业空间通常受围墙、建筑和既有绿化限制
需减少对地下电缆、管道、周边环境和交通的影响
挖掘、堆砌、修坡、平整、吊装和回填由多种附件连续完成
en: Excavation dimensions, slopes and depths require tight control to meet drainage design
Walls, buildings and existing landscaping commonly restrict the work envelope
Work must limit impact on underground cables, pipe, surrounding property and traffic
Excavation, material placement, slope shaping, grading, lifting and backfill are completed with multiple attachments

zh: 资料认为优化后的XE35U基本覆盖花园改造中的挖掘和清理平整。
副配重和回转中心后移改善了稳定性，但动态稳定性仍需复测。
回转力矩偏小和推土铲无浮动影响排水管回填、草坪基底整平和收面效率。
历史PRO驾驶空间改进需按当前量产配置确认。
资料记录蜂鸣器消音缺失，后续报警逻辑属于历史计划。
双管路和快换支持多种铲斗、破碎锤和拇指钳；高流量景观属具需另行核验。
en: The source considers the optimized XE35U broadly capable of excavation and finishing in garden renovation.
Counterweight and a rearward center of rotation improved stability, while dynamic stability still requires retesting.
Low reported swing torque and no blade float reduce drainage backfill, lawn-base grading and finishing productivity.
Historical PRO operator-space improvements require confirmation on the current production machine.
The source records missing alarm muting; later alarm logic was a historical plan.
Dual plumbing and a quick coupler support multiple buckets, breaker and thumb; high-flow landscape tools require separate validation.

conclusion.zh: 沟渠和附件作业基本覆盖，但行走启停稳定性、回转回填和推土铲功能仍是现场效率风险。
conclusion.en: Trenching and attachment work are broadly covered, but travel start-stop stability, swing-assisted backfill and blade functions remain jobsite productivity risks.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

customer.zh: 承包商、租赁商、市政与公共事业单位
customer.en: Contractors, rental companies, municipalities and utilities

zh: 狭小位置机动
稳定起吊路缘石和预制件
挖斗、拇指钳与液压夯兼容
回填与表面修整效率
en: Mobility in confined areas
Stable lifting of curbs and precast parts
Compatibility with bucket, thumb and compactor
Backfill and finishing productivity

zh: 勘测与标记
沟渠和基础开挖
回填与压实
预制件安装
铺设路面材料
清理交付
en: Survey and mark
Excavate trenches and foundations
Backfill and compact
Install precast components
Place pavement material
Clean and hand over

zh: 排水沟渠和道路基础
桥墩、护栏和路缘石
沥青或混凝土路面
施工完成后的清理与验收区域
en: Drainage ditches and road foundations
Bridge piers, guardrails and curbs
Asphalt or concrete pavement
Final clean-up and handover area

zh: 需要在狭小位置灵活机动并完成沟渠、基础和路缘设施作业
需兼容挖斗、拇指钳、液压夯等多种机具
任务链包含开挖、吊装、回填、压实、铺装和清理
en: The machine must maneuver in confined positions while handling trenches, foundations and curb infrastructure
Buckets, thumb, hydraulic compactor and other work tools are required
The workflow combines excavation, lifting, backfill, compaction, paving and clean-up

zh: 资料认为沟渠开挖、清理平整和起吊能力基本满足道路桥梁场景。
副配重和回转中心后移改善稳定性，但行走启停时的动态稳定性仅部分满足。
回转力矩和推土铲浮动是回填与表面修整的主要效率差距。
历史PRO驾驶空间改进和报警逻辑需要按当前配置复核。
双管路和快换具备基础附件适配能力；液压夯、破碎锤等机具的压力、背压和冷却窗口仍需验证。
资料总体结论还指出高速行走偏慢，会影响道路工地场内转场效率。
en: The source assesses trenching, clean-up, grading and lifting capability as broadly adequate for road and bridge work.
Counterweight and a rearward center of rotation improved stability, but dynamic stability during travel starts and stops was only partly adequate.
Swing torque and blade float are the main backfill and surface-finishing productivity gaps.
Historical PRO cab-space and alarm-logic changes require confirmation against current equipment.
Dual plumbing and a quick coupler provide baseline work-tool capability; pressure, back pressure and cooling windows for compactors and breakers still require validation.
The source-level conclusion also identifies low high-range travel speed as a jobsite relocation constraint.

conclusion.zh: 负载敏感系统和基础附件满足易用性，但高速行走与高流量机具覆盖存在明确差距。
conclusion.en: The load-sensing system and baseline attachments support ease of use, but high-speed travel and high-flow attachment coverage are clear gaps.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

customer.zh: 农场主、农业承包商、租赁客户
customer.en: Farm owners, agricultural contractors and rental users

zh: 非专业机手易操作
不平地面启停稳定
拇指钳、割草机和开带机兼容
高效场内转运
en: Intuitive operation for non-professional users
Stable start/stop on uneven terrain
Thumb, mower and brush-cutter compatibility
Efficient travel within the property

zh: 挖根并推倒小树
拇指钳搬运石块和木料
切割较大树木并拔根
割草机或开带机清理灌木
en: Excavate roots and push small trees
Handle rock and timber with a thumb
Cut larger trees and remove stumps
Clear brush with a mower or brush cutter

zh: 灌木丛和杂草
小型树木、树根和树桩
大型石块和清理后的木料
农场内复杂地形和长距离转场路线
en: Brush and weeds
Small trees, roots and stumps
Large rocks and cleared timber
Complex farm terrain and long relocation routes

zh: 需要在农场广阔、不平和复杂地形中灵活机动
标准斗或窄斗与拇指钳用于挖根、拔树和搬运，割草机或开带机用于灌木清理
大量用户并非专业挖机操作手，对直观操控和低启停冲击要求高
en: The machine must maneuver across broad, uneven and complex farm terrain
Standard or narrow buckets with a thumb handle roots, trees and material, while mowers or land-clearing tools remove brush
Many users are not professional excavator operators, increasing the need for intuitive control and low start-stop shock

zh: 资料认为液控负载敏感系统提供了操作简单的基础。
优化后的操控性被判断为基本满足，但微动、启停冲击和新手机手误操作仍需验证。
推土铲和可选副配重为不平地面稳定作业提供基础。
资料要求TOPS/FOPS防护、行走报警灯和蜂鸣器，并指出蜂鸣器消音当时未配置。
双管路和快换可覆盖基础铲斗与拇指钳；割草机、开带机等高流量属具受AUX1能力限制。
资料明确判断XE35U高速行走偏慢，不满足长距离场内转运需求。
en: The source states that the hydraulic pilot load-sensing system provides a basis for simple operation.
Optimized controllability was assessed as broadly adequate, while inching, travel shock and novice misuse still require validation.
The blade and optional counterweight provide a foundation for stability on uneven ground.
The source calls for TOPS/FOPS protection, a travel warning light and alarm, and records that alarm muting was not equipped at that time.
Dual plumbing and a quick coupler support baseline buckets and thumb; mower and land-clearing tools are constrained by AUX1 capability.
The source explicitly assesses XE35U high-range travel speed as inadequate for long relocation within farms.

conclusion.zh: 沟槽和管道作业基础能力具备，但行走速度、回转回填、报警消音与行走稳定性需提升。
conclusion.en: Baseline trenching and pipe-handling capability is present, but travel speed, swing-assisted backfill, alarm muting and travel stability need improvement.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

customer.zh: 农场主、农业承包商、租赁客户
customer.en: Farm owners, agricultural contractors and rental users

zh: 直观操控
复杂地形稳定
窄斗与拇指钳兼容
吊装管道与高效回填
长距离场内转运
en: Intuitive control
Stability on complex terrain
Narrow-bucket and thumb compatibility
Pipe lifting and productive backfill
Efficient travel over long farm distances

zh: 测量并标记沟渠
按土壤选择标准斗或窄斗
吊装排水管道
回填并加固
表面整理
en: Survey and mark the trench
Select a standard or narrow bucket for soil conditions
Lift drainage pipe
Backfill and secure
Finish the surface

zh: 农田排水沟渠
灌溉系统和地下排水管道
沟槽内杂草、石块及其他障碍物
en: Farm drainage ditches
Irrigation systems and buried drainage pipe
Weeds, rocks and other trench obstructions

zh: 需在农场广阔、松软和不平地形中连续开沟并长距离转场
根据土壤选择标准斗或窄斗，必要时配合拇指钳处理杂草和石块
任务链同时包含测量、开沟、吊管、回填加固和表面整理
en: Continuous trenching and long relocation occur across broad, soft and uneven farm terrain
A standard or narrow bucket is selected for soil conditions, with a thumb used for weeds and rock when needed
The workflow combines survey, trenching, pipe lifting, secured backfill and surface finishing

zh: 资料认为液控负载敏感系统提供了非专业机手所需的直观操控基础。
优化后的操控性被判断为基本满足，但连续沟槽的深度误差和微动性能仍需量化。
推土铲和可选副配重为复杂地形稳定性提供基础，行走启停冲击仍需复测。
资料要求TOPS/FOPS、行走报警灯和蜂鸣器，并记录蜂鸣器消音缺失。
双管路和快换可覆盖标准斗、窄斗、清理斗和拇指钳；吊管工况还需按方向、半径和推土铲位置验证起吊能力。
资料明确判断高速行走偏慢，同时回转力矩和推土铲浮动会影响回填与表面整理效率。
en: The source states that the hydraulic pilot load-sensing system provides intuitive control for non-professional operators.
Optimized controllability was assessed as broadly adequate, while depth error and fine control during continuous trenching still require measurement.
The blade and optional counterweight provide a stability foundation on complex terrain, while travel start-stop shock needs retesting.
The source calls for TOPS/FOPS, a travel warning light and alarm, and records missing alarm muting.
Dual plumbing and a quick coupler support standard, narrow and clean-up buckets plus a thumb; pipe lifting also requires validation by direction, radius and blade position.
The source explicitly identifies low high-range travel speed, while swing torque and blade float affect backfill and surface-finishing productivity.

records.competitor: Kubota U35-4, KX033-4, KX030-4; SANY SY35U

conclusion.zh: 纸面优势集中在斗杆挖掘力、起吊力、AUX2和可选长斗杆；主要差距为重量、运输尺寸、铲斗力、行走速度、AUX1流量、卸油管路和常规尾型谱。
conclusion.en: Paper strengths center on arm force, lifting capacity, AUX2 and an optional long arm. Main gaps are mass, transport package, bucket force, travel speed, AUX1 flow, case-drain plumbing and the missing conventional-tail variant.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
